drill: RC closure — routed-chat real-backend smoke: all four /chat routes end-to-end with real OpenAI embeddings (D-024) + real OpenAI chat (D-037) + real gpt-4.1-mini classifier (D-109) + real Tavily knowledge source (D-111) (D-111 prep / operator capture)

metadata.environment: real backend — STORAGE_BACKEND=postgres (migrations 0001..0009 applied), EMBEDDING_BACKEND=openai, EMBEDDING_MODEL=text-embedding-3-large, EMBEDDING_DIMENSION=3072, CHAT_BACKEND=openai, CHAT_MODEL=gpt-4.1, CLASSIFIER_BACKEND=openai, CLASSIFIER_MODEL=gpt-4.1-mini, KNOWLEDGE_BACKEND=tavily, KNOWLEDGE_MAX_RESULTS=<TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — default 5 per A-47>; OP-2 bounded retry/backoff active at defaults; webhook secret set
metadata.notes: Live operator evidence for the routed-chat milestone closure (roadmap section 6). Per the redaction rule (RUNBOOK 'Routed-chat real-backend smoke'), credential-bearing values (OPENAI_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, PUBLIC_HOSTNAME if used, webhook URL token) are replaced by <REDACTED> placeholders or a _redacted: true flag; structural outcomes (status strings, log-line shapes, row values, route names, prompt versions, latency_ms magnitudes, cited URLs) are preserved verbatim. Operator action required before commit: (1) copy this file to docs/routed-chat-drill/routed-chat-smoke-<YYYYMMDD>-evidence.json (UTC-dated), (2) drop the top-level "_template": true flag, (3) replace every <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR> placeholder with the verbatim captured observation, (4) run the redaction grep from the RUNBOOK subsection.

preflight_state.boot_log_line_shape: app.created env=<env> version=<version> embedding_backend=openai embedding_dim=3072 chat_backend=openai chat_model=gpt-4.1 classifier_backend=openai classifier_model=gpt-4.1-mini knowledge_backend=tavily
preflight_state.boot_log_line_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — verbatim app.created line; a successful line implies the embedding, chat, classifier, and knowledge gates all passed (R-10)>
preflight_state.migrations_at_head: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected: 9 rows in the yoyo migration table, tail = 0009.chat-knowledge-searches>

seed_note_round_trip.note_text: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — the /note text the routed questions ground on>

route_round_trips._note: One entry per product-register route. The classifier is live: requested_route is recorded from the chat_route_decisions row, not pre-asserted; a reroute (effective != requested) is captured verbatim, not a defect.

general_llm.reply_text_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — expected to end with the model-knowledge trailer>

diary_plus_llm.reply_text_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — segments labeled; degradation header first if diary evidence was empty/weak>

rewrite_row.rewritten_query: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — string, or null if the rewrite degraded>

diary_plus_web.reply_text_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — segments labeled; the web segment lists its cited URLs verbatim>

rewrite_row.rewritten_query: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — string, or null if the rewrite degraded>

knowledge_search_row.outward_query_verbatim: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — the query actually sent to Tavily (auditable personal-context distillation, D-111 privacy note)>
knowledge_search_row.result_count: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — integer; 0 means the search failed and the route degraded in-route>

diary_plus_web.cited_urls_in_reply: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — the URLs rendered under the web label, verbatim>

out_of_scope_for_this_drill: Any src/ / tests/ / schema / migration / config change.
Any live provider call inside make check or any new gated test.
Routing-accuracy measurement or thresholds (D-108: observed via traces, not gated).
Resilience-knob tuning beyond D-047 / D-049 defaults.
A-47 knowledge-default re-measurement (the drill observes the defaults as-is).
A-10 edit/delete; A-21 / Phase 9 host seams.

summary.diary_plus_web_round_trip_green: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — true/false; requires a reply whose web segment cites at least one URL drawn from the Tavily results>
summary.provenance_labels_observed: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — true if every mixed reply labeled its segments and no model/web content was attributed to the diary>
summary.closes_routed_chat_milestone: <TO_FILL_BY_OPERATOR — true only when all four round trips are green>
